text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan hasn't shown up for training, so I go
looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, sorryyy! I was in the mood for something
sweet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I'm feeling a teensy bit tired. You get like that
sometimes too, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I'm feeling a teensy bit tired. You get like that
sometimes too, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text: Here you go! Two Fluffy Strawberry Parfaits!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu! ♪ Do you want one, Big Bro?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu! ♪ Do you want one, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I dunno if I can eat two all by myself, but I don't
wanna waste it... so let's eat them together.

...It's not like the parfait did anything wrong. I
accept it, but I still lecture her about skipping
training.
